prompt: can you draft a quick email to my coauthor saying hey we should probably meet next week to discuss the revisions, maybe Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon works best for me

assertions.name: formatted_prompt_present
assertions.description: Output contains a fenced code block with a structured/formatted prompt before any execution content

assertions.name: two_phase_visible
assertions.description: There is a clear visual separation between the formatted prompt display and the execution phase

assertions.name: role_selection
assertions.description: Administrative/Email role is selected (task is drafting an email)

assertions.name: depth_calibration
assertions.description: Depth is correctly calibrated to Light (simple email draft)

assertions.name: task_executed
assertions.description: After showing the formatted prompt, Claude actually drafts the email
